notes: Transfer cost is deducted from available budget
Budget must balance: price of riders in minus price of riders out minus transfer costs = 0
You can cancel transfers up until the deadline of the next race
Until the start of the first race you can change your squad freely
After that, each transfer brings in exactly one new rider
Only the 12 riders you field (not bench) can score points
Teammate bonus: +10 points if your rider is a teammate of the race winner, regardless of finishing position

kopman.description: Designate one kopman per race. Kopman earns BONUS points on top of normal race points if they finish top 6.
kopman.teammatBonus: The teammate(s) of the race winner earn 10 bonus points regardless of finishing position
kopman.notes: Kopman bonus stacks on top of normal points. A Monument win = 125 + 30 = 155 points for your kopman.

phases.cobbled: Omloop through Parijs-Roubaix. Prioritise cobbled specialists. MVDP is primary kopman for Monument days.
phases.ardennes: Ronde van Limburg through Luik. Pivot to puncheurs/climbers. Pogacar or Evenepoel as kopman. NOTE: Amstel Gold Race is WorldTour (not Monument) — max 100pts for win.

strategy.transferWindow: Main pivot after Parijs-Roubaix (12 april). Release cobbled fillers, bring in Ardennes specialists.
strategy.kopmanPrinciple: Monument + top favourite = kopman. A Monument win scores 125 + 30 kopman bonus = 155 points total. Never waste kopman on a rider unlikely to finish top 6.
strategy.teammatBonus: 10 bonus points for teammates of the winner — field as many riders from the likely winning team as possible on Monument days.
strategy.budgetNote: Budget 120M total. Max 4 riders per team.
